## What changed

Describe the change and the problem it solves.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] New or changed behavior has focused test coverage where practical.
- [ ] Documentation and examples match the behavior.

## Public-safety check

- [ ] This change contains no client names, private screenshots, prompts, credentials, local paths, or assets with unclear rights.
- [ ] Any example data is fictional and safe to publish.

## Related issue

Link the issue or explain why this change does not need one.
